description: Fine-tuning data overlaps the evaluation set, so reported gains are memorization, not capability.
body: Failure mode: examples from the evaluation set leak into the fine-tuning corpus, so the model memorizes test answers and the reported gain does not generalize to real inputs. Detection signals: an outsized eval gain that does not reproduce on a freshly collected holdout, and overlap found when deduplicating training data against the eval set. Do not trust the inflated benchmark. Safer fallback: deduplicate the training corpus against all eval sets before training, re-measure on a clean, never-trained holdout, and treat the contaminated eval result as invalid until the overlap is removed.
